purpose: Help the PPT AI Agent choose copyable TSX blueprints for red/blue comparison decks, then derive final pages into slides/*.tsx and edit implementation directly.

components.role: Reusable cross-slide visual components for the red-blue comparison system.

blueprints.role: Copyable TSX blueprint pages. Start here when selecting a page structure.

slides.role: Final registered slide entries. group.json.layouts and manifest.json source.path must only reference this directory.

data.role: Demo or deck content data. JSON carries content only, not page structure decisions.

theme.role: Shared color, typography, and visual token definitions.

blueprints.name: Cover Comparison
blueprints.visual_pattern: centered comparison title + purple connector/separator + topic scope line + red/blue entity legend + soft circular decorations

blueprints.name: Topic Overview
blueprints.visual_pattern: left-aligned title block + subtitle + 3x2 numbered icon cards + soft red/blue/purple background circles

blueprints.name: Economy Size Growth
blueprints.visual_pattern: left primary vertical comparison bar chart + right stacked rank and bar metric cards + soft red/blue/purple circular decorations

blueprints.name: Economic Structure
blueprints.visual_pattern: two side-by-side entity cards + screenshot-safe donut charts + center share callouts + legends + concise analysis boxes
avoid_for: more than two primary entity cards

blueprints.name: Demographics Snapshot
blueprints.visual_pattern: two side-by-side entity cards + top red/blue accent rail + large hero metric + status indicator + compact KPI rows
avoid_for: more than two primary entity cards

blueprints.name: Aging Dependency
blueprints.visual_pattern: left primary 100% stacked horizontal composition chart + right elderly-share metric callouts + purple conclusion card + soft circular decorations
suitable_for: two to four entity part-to-whole comparison

planned_blueprint_families.intent: Alternating milestone timeline with purple spine and date badges.
Large numeric callout with concise supporting explanation.
Left narrative list with right-side image or illustration panel.

agent_workflow_notes: Read catalog.json first and choose the blueprint closest to the page intent.
Copy or derive the selected blueprint into slides/*.tsx before adapting it.
group.json.layouts and manifest.json source.path must only reference slides/*.tsx.
Do not paste source HTML into TSX; extract reusable components and page blueprints.
Use data/*.json for content replacement only; change slides/*.tsx for structure, spacing, and component composition.
